memories.value: Baselines will be established after first 3 daily runs. Metrics tracked per agent: avg_tokens_per_run, avg_duration_ms, avg_tool_calls, success_rate, runs_per_day. Updated with exponential moving average (alpha=0.2) after each daily run.

Tracks crystallization proposals and their lifecycle. Each entry keyed by pattern_hash: proposed_date, skill_name, status (proposed|approved|rejected|implemented), estimated_savings_tokens. Check status on each run. If rejected, note reason and avoid re-proposing.
Running cost estimates updated daily. Dimensions: tokens_per_day_by_agent, crystallization_savings_cumulative, model_downgrade_candidates (agent, runs_at_current_quality, confidence).

Tracks past recommendations and measured outcomes. Each entry: recommendation_id, date_proposed, target, action, status (proposed|adopted|measured|ineffective), measured_impact. Goal: learn which recommendation types deliver the most value.
